description_long: This is a large, detached bungalow set within a spacious, landscaped lot featuring a main house with multiple rooflines, several outbuildings, and a fenced perimeter. The main structure has a complex, multi-hipped roof with dormer windows and a central entrance highlighted by a circular driveway. The property includes a swimming pool, a garage, and several smaller auxiliary buildings, all surrounded by manicured lawns, trees, and shrubbery. The windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern on the main facade, with grouped windows on the sides and rear. The exterior walls are light-colored, likely stucco or painted masonry, with contrasting darker roofing. The grounds are detailed with pathways, a driveway, and a variety of vegetation, giving the property a suburban, upscale residential feel.
description: A large, upscale bungalow with a multi-hipped roof, central entrance, and landscaped grounds featuring a pool, garage, and several outbuildings. The property is surrounded by a fence and includes manicured lawns and trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, circular driveway, and prominent central facade with symmetrical windows and landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, auxiliary buildings, and the expanse of the backyard with trees and fencing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swimming pool, grouped windows, and the open backyard area with additional landscaping.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the relationship between the main house, outbuildings, and the extensive fenced yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side and rear windows
